business_name: Business for Sale 10k Month Home Based
description:
Having a  senior housing/placement advisor business is quite a lucrative business and quite rewarding as there is a high demand and it serves a growing senior demographic. 
 
I am a very successful senior advisor.  I help seniors and their families at no charge to them. I get paid when the senior moves into an assisted living, memory care, respite, or independent living community. The communities pay up to 100% of the senior's monthly rate.  
 
Referral commission checks paid out from the facilities in the USA range from $4,000 to 10,000 (or more) for each referral/placement.  I now refer up to 10 seniors a month, and so can you. Right from home start full or part time. 
 
No special skills or Education needed to run this business, and you do NOT need to be certified with the CSA (website). 
 
I am a Certified Dementia Practitioner, a published author, and the owner of the successful, Star Light Senior Advisors. 
 
 
With 10k seniors turning 65 Each day in the USA, this industry is booming. Don't spend $95k and 10% of your earnings to a franchise, I can give you everything you need contract (for the facilities), brochures, your own website, logo, exclusive 104 page manual I wrote myself, 1 on 1 consulting, marketing materials, and much more for a small fraction of the cost.  
 
Send contact information when reaching out
